name: tlsAuthenticateAsServerVerifyClient
title: tlsAuthenticateAsServerVerifyClient
description: Starts the authentication handshake as server and verify the client certificate. Certificate common names have to match the entries in the Vector Security Manager. It is possible to copy the values from the Security Profile.

parameters.name: certificate
parameters.description: You have to specify the common name of the server certificate.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
